narrative: Good data health. Critical violations detected in confidence scale but monitoring active. Week 5 events fully compliant.

top_violations.message: 3 confidence values are on 0-100 scale (92, 92, 73) instead of 0.0-1.0. This breaks Week 4 Cartographer filtering logic.
5 confidence values are integers instead of floats. Type mismatch causes silent failures in all downstream consumers.
2 events have recorded_at before occurred_at. Violates event sourcing immutability principle.

recommended_actions.action: Fix confidence scale in extraction pipeline
recommended_actions.details: Update extractor.py line 156 to output float in [0.0, 1.0] instead of integer 0-100
recommended_actions.risk_reduction: Eliminates CRITICAL violations affecting 2 downstream consumers

recommended_actions.details: Run migration script to convert existing 0-100 values to 0.0-1.0 scale
recommended_actions.risk_reduction: Fixes 8 existing records with scale issues

recommended_actions.details: Run validation before allowing commits to prevent future schema drift
recommended_actions.risk_reduction: Prevents confidence scale changes from reaching production
